ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayNG
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG
Language: kotlin
A V2Ray client for Android, support Xray core and v2fly core

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Domilopment/apk-extractor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Domilopment/apk-extractor
Language: kotlin
A Simple Modern APK Extractor App

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EchoMusicApp/Echo-Music
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EchoMusicApp/Echo-Music
Language: kotlin
A modern Android music app with ad-free streaming, synced lyrics, offline playback, and an intuitive user experience.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ExTV/Podroid
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ExTV/Podroid
Language: kotlin
A rootless Android app that boots Alpine Linux: run containers (Podman/Docker/LXC) and GUI desktop apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JetBrains/compose-multiplatform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JetBrains/compose-multiplatform
Language: kotlin
Compose Multiplatform, a modern UI framework for Kotlin that makes building performant and beautiful user interfaces easy and enjoyable.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JetBrains/koog
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JetBrains/koog
Language: kotlin
Koog is a JVM (Java and Kotlin) framework for building predictable, fault-tolerant and enterprise-ready AI agents across all platforms – from backend services to Android and iOS, JVM, and even in-browser environments. Koog is based on our AI products expertise and provides proven solutions for complex LLM and AI problems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JetBrains/kotlin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JetBrains/kotlin
Language: kotlin
The Kotlin Programming Language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PranshulGG/WeatherMaster
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PranshulGG/WeatherMaster
Language: kotlin
A Weather app for android with multiple sources 🌦🌞☔

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RikkaApps/Shizuku
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RikkaApps/Shizuku
Language: kotlin
Using system APIs directly with adb/root privileges from normal apps through a Java process started with app_process.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: andreknieriem/headunit-revived
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/andreknieriem/headunit-revived
Language: kotlin

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/android/nowinandroid
Language: kotlin

ns0:entry.ns0:title: breezy-weather/breezy-weather
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/breezy-weather/breezy-weather
Language: kotlin
A feature-rich weather app with good visualizations and more than 50 sources.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: capcom6/android-sms-gateway
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/capcom6/android-sms-gateway
Language: kotlin
The SMS Gateway for Android™ app enables sending and receiving SMS messages through an API that can be accessed directly on the device or via a cloud server when direct device access is not possible.

URL: https://github.com/damontecres/Wholphin

URL: https://github.com/ktorio/ktor
Language: kotlin
Framework for quickly creating connected applications in Kotlin with minimal effort
